item.title: I'll be there for you.
item.dc:creator: Nandortherelentless

item.title: An unhinged year-end dump: sayonara edition
item.description:
This works as a bonus-parent, too
But why is it so easy to be so sleepy, when least opportune?
But that’s me at baseline
The best part of coming home is Wally’s reactions, unbridled zoomies
And it’s not a seasonal thing, that shit goes year round
“Just take it one thing at a time.” Okay but they come at me in 3’s, how should I prioritize?
Wally’s normal is trying to gaslight me saying I forgot to feed him
Which doggo is your spirit animal, right now?
This was cute
I’d watch it!
I can supply various vices, whatever (legally) helps.
This is the pressure DARE tried to warn us about
“I ain’t got nothing but love for ya”
I get to marry my best friend in 160 days so we can spend the rest of our lives like this
This was an interesting transition
We’ve had some doozies in our adventures, what are some of your nutty grocery-delivery stories?
Take 1-2 QD, PRN
Bring on all of the derpiest dummy thicc bois. Also, please leave their ears floppy. It adds to the derp level.
I’ve got that going for me, which is nice
My brain and my mouth can’t move at the same speed and I bite my lip or cheeks constantly
Festive depression deserves some credit, it’s not the same as seasonal, to me
Can-do’s-ville, babydoll
Bill and James have some wild conversations
You know, I’m something of a chef, myself
Seventh grade me just got stopped in her jelly-sandal tracks
I’m used to having at least two around, this past year has sucked
Found my spirit animal
An absolute unit of an animal
I used to feel like if I didn’t respond right away, it was inconsiderate to the sender. I’ve gotten better with letting this go, as I’ve gotten older.
I don’t have the energy to jump jump, anymore
Scumbag brain
Unconditioning oneself is exhausting
Shout out to the eel in the Roku screen saver
Cheesy shit I’ve sent to the fiancée
Also works for being in your early 40s
Here’s some Gemma brain bleach, as a treat for making it all the way through. Merry Christmas and Happy New Year, fellow Imgurian. Stay safe!
item.dc:creator: tellyourdogisaidhi

item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Huge LEGO Wizarding World with 250k+ Pieces! (2024 Update) | 2024.08 | Beyond the Brick
item.description: At BrickFair Chantilly 2024, 3 members of the Konstanski family and Daniel are interviewed about this insane LEGO Wizarding World set. This is truly a generational project and labour of love that has been getting built, updated, and expanded year after year! Besides the complete aboveground Hogwarts castle ?, it now features the underground level featuring many of the iconic scenes in breathtaking detail ?. Also included are the complete grounds of the school, Hogsmeade Village, and Diagon Alley.

item.dc:creator: GKNops

item.title: Not Black Holes
item.description: Scientists say that something mysterious punched gigantic holes in parts of the Milky Way: Something at least a million times the mass of the Sun tore through the Milky Way. This rules out ordinary stars, as it's just too massive. And while a supermassive black hole could fit the profile, no such black hole has been detected in the area. Ana Bonaca, an astronomer involved in the research, proposes an intriguing theory: the object could be a dense "bullet" of dark matter, an invisible and poorly understood substance thought to make up a significant portion of the universe. However, it's too early to draw definitive conclusions. The research was presented to the American Physical Society.

item.dc:creator: lydecker17

item.title: Snowball Vibes
item.description: The only thing this @imgur engagement prop of pitting Acorns vs Pinecones has taught me is that they care to learn little from our community. They choose to divide rather than unite for a common cause, if even for gladiator-like sport, and even fumble that and make it unfun. This website is now a cash grab. 60ish% of my posts are snowball related. I never asked for this. We couldn’t choose teams. This is dumb, and so many imgurians took the bait. Idk which is worse; watching the demise of my last social media outlet, or its community. /endrant
item.dc:creator: HubicPairs

item.title: The 496th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps
item.description:
Greetings, friends! I hope you are all having an agreeable Holiday Season!
@PotatoCheesMonk
It's for the best
This is how you use fame for good.
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild *every other* Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever I post or one of my dumps goes Viral. If you wish to chat, I'm frequently in ElbowDeepInAHorse and PotatoCheesMonk's Discord Servers between the hours of 7pm and 1am GMT-5 during the week, and at unpredictable but frequent times Saturdays and Sundays This week I'm raising awareness for a Wild Life Hospital in England, the Lower Moss Wood Nature Reserve. They are in desperate need of funds to keep their doors open and keep educating the public. Here is a link to their Imgur Post about it, with a Go Fund Me link at the bottom. https://imgur.com/gallery/please-help-us-1097nGc They'll be closing at the end of January if they can't raise enough money.
I don't know what else asl stands for...
EDIT: • The Shape Of Fire - A Dragon That "Kidnaps" You, Brings You To His Cave Full Of Gold (Stolen From Billionaires Who S/He Has Eaten), Lets You Use The Gold To Help Poor People and Also Regularly Rails You While You're Wearing A Cute Little Mini Skirt And Thigh-High Stockings.
That's pretty much the whole reason one would sleep nude.
The Langoliers by Stephen King
Sorry about the cropping on this one
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters @DaymanAhAAAAah @SecretHarpy Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #Phone_Dump #Meme_Dump #Memes #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple #GregFromHR #SteveFromAccounting #DougFromSales

item.title: With a lead of over 80,000 snowballs thrown, the winner is Team Acorn!
item.description: The final scores were 8,822,252 for Team Acorn and 8,735,608 for Team Pinecone Edit: A user made a post claiming they ran a script which caused Acorn to win. Upon removal of this user's count, as well as any other suspicious counts, Acorn still takes the win with a closer lead of 9,574
item.dc:creator: MartynMage

item.title: When toy friend become real one
item.dc:creator: TheWhatever666

item.title: Taking Steps is Easy, Standing Still is Hard
item.description:
There is something about the act of closing a calendar year, a task as tiny as it's monumental, like washing the last dish after an hours-long dinner party, except the dinner party lasted 365 days and the dishes include everything from wine glasses to sledgehammers.
Every year is its own puzzle-box of peculiar challenges. We've been doing this for 13 years now, which in cartoonist years feels like both a geological epoch and the blink of an eye and in that time we've experienced global crises like the pandemic, recessions and countless “little problems” that weren't so little then but seem almost insignificant now.
One of the ways we cope with time – with its merciless forward motion, with the absurdity of continuing to draw lines on paper and pretend those lines mean something – is by revisiting our best comic strips from the year.
It’s not just self-congratulation (though we’re not above that) it’s something deeper, a way of reminding ourselves that even in the roughest stretches of the year, we managed to create something that made us laugh, or made someone else laugh, or at least made us feel less alone in the dark.
In this respect, 2024 was a real treasure trove. It was fun. No, scratch that: it was VERY fun. We went to festivals – glorious, chaotic, overstimulating festivals where the air smells like ink and coffee and ambition. Angoulême was a highlight, of course. But there were other adventures, too: a road trip through Belgium that felt like stepping into the panels of a Franco-Belgian comic, and not one but TWO visits to Vienna, which is somehow both the most elegant city in Europe and the one most likely to inspire surrealist doodles after a few cocktails.
And then there’s Patreon. Oh, Patreon! What a strange and beautiful thing it is to be supported by people who care enough about what you do to give money for it. To those people (you know who you are) we owe not just our gratitude but our ability to keep going, to keep drawing, to keep finding the absurd and funny in the everyday. Thank you feels not enough, but we mean it with a depth that’s hard to articulate in a medium primarily composed of speech bubbles.
And now here we are, staring down the barrel of 2025. We’re looking forward to it – the new strips we’ll create, the new people we’ll meet, the new places we’ll visit (and the old places we’ll revisit, because let’s be honest, Vienna probably hasn’t seen the last of us). There will be challenges, there always are. But if 2024 taught us anything, it’s that even the hardest years can be fun if you’re willing to see the humor in them. So here’s to 2025. Let’s draw!
item.dc:creator: Warandpeasofficial
Slayage
